releases.title: Cafezin 0.1.8
releases.summary: Initial updater-ready release with official macOS and Windows installers.
highlights: Introduced the first public updater feed for Cafezin.
Published official macOS and Windows installer artifacts.
Established the base release channel for future automatic updates.
